description: Canonical operational semantics registry for Proposal Classification Matrix (PCM) states used by detectAndProposeContact.php and related governance workflows.

new_elc.operatorAction: Create new entity, location, and contact records.
new_elc.systemMeaning: No conflicting entity, contact, or location records were detected. Validation requirements were satisfied.
aiNarrativeIntent: Explain that the proposal is operationally eligible for insertion.

existing_location.operatorAction: Review and link the contact to the existing location record.
existing_location.systemMeaning: The submitted proposal matched an authoritative existing location record.
aiNarrativeIntent: Explain that the location already exists.
Explain that duplicate location creation is prohibited.

duplicate_contact.operatorAction: Review the existing contact record before proceeding.
duplicate_contact.systemMeaning: The submitted contact already exists or strongly matches an existing contact.

possible_duplicate_contact.operatorAction: Review the possible duplicate contact match.
possible_duplicate_contact.systemMeaning: A partial or uncertain contact match was identified.
aiNarrativeIntent: Explain that a possible duplicate was detected.

possible_location_duplicate.operatorAction: Review the possible location match before insertion.
possible_location_duplicate.systemMeaning: The proposal partially matches an existing location record.
aiNarrativeIntent: Explain that a possible location duplicate exists.

multiple_parcels.operatorAction: Select the correct parcel before continuing.
multiple_parcels.systemMeaning: Multiple authoritative parcel candidates were identified for the proposed address.
aiNarrativeIntent: Explain that multiple parcel candidates were found.
Explain that authoritative parcel selection is required.

invalid_location.operatorAction: Correct or manually resolve the location before proceeding.
invalid_location.systemMeaning: The proposal failed authoritative location validation requirements.

incomplete.systemMeaning: Required proposal data was missing or incomplete.
aiNarrativeIntent: Explain which required information is missing.

valid_usps.operatorAction: Proceed with insertion using USPS validation confidence.
valid_usps.systemMeaning: USPS validation confirmed a deliverable address despite unresolved parcel enrichment.
aiNarrativeIntent: Explain why insertion remains operationally permitted.

needs_suite.operatorAction: Obtain the required suite or unit number.
needs_suite.systemMeaning: The authoritative address requires a secondary unit designator.
aiNarrativeIntent: Explain that a suite or unit is required.
Recommend obtaining the missing suite information.

missing_secondary.operatorAction: Obtain the missing secondary address information.
missing_secondary.systemMeaning: The authoritative address indicates missing secondary addressing information.
aiNarrativeIntent: Explain that secondary addressing is incomplete.
